steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “precisely identify the dates when significant events such as solstices occurred” is the strongest clue. The word “precisely” signals that the Mexica could track time with accuracy and exactness.

steps.title: Match to the correct answer
steps.content: Exactitude means precision and accuracy—it directly expresses the kind of exact measurement described in the passage. The other three choices either contradict the signal of precision (precariousness suggests uncertainty), describe irrelevant qualities (resilience refers to recovering from hardship; inconspicuousness means being unnoticed), or simply do not fit the context. That matches choice B — B is correct.
